query: SELECT uo.id, uo.userId, uo.organizationId, uo.platformRole, o.name as orgName, o.shortCode FROM user_organizations uo LEFT JOIN organizations o ON uo.organizationId = o.id WHERE uo.userId = 1265089 ORDER BY uo.organizationId, uo.id;
